'''âd-ng-t''' ('''kadangat''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:eclecticise|eclecticise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-ng-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:eclecticise|eclecticise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-ng-t
|-
! Lemma
| kadangat
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidangat|thidangat]] || [[word:jidangat|jidangat]] || [[word:shidangat|shidangat]] || [[word:kidangat|kidangat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudangat|thuthudangat]] || [[word:jujudangat|jujudangat]] || [[word:shushudangat|shushudangat]] || [[word:kukudangat|kukudangat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudangat|thudangat]] || [[word:judangat|judangat]] || [[word:shudangat|shudangat]] || [[word:kudangat|kudangat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudangat|thudangat]] || [[word:judangat|judangat]] || [[word:shudangat|shudangat]] || [[word:kudangat|kudangat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedangat|thedangat]] || [[word:jedangat|jedangat]] || [[word:shedangat|shedangat]] || [[word:kedangat|kedangat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodangat|thothodangat]] || [[word:jojodangat|jojodangat]] || [[word:shoshodangat|shoshodangat]] || [[word:kokodangat|kokodangat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodangat|thodangat]] || [[word:jodangat|jodangat]] || [[word:shodangat|shodangat]] || [[word:kodangat|kodangat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodangat|thodangat]] || [[word:jodangat|jodangat]] || [[word:shodangat|shodangat]] || [[word:kodangat|kodangat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdangat|thĂŠdangat]] || [[word:jĂŠdangat|jĂŠdangat]] || [[word:shĂŠdangat|shĂŠdangat]] || [[word:kĂŠdangat|kĂŠdangat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadangat|thathadangat]] || [[word:jajadangat|jajadangat]] || [[word:shashadangat|shashadangat]] || [[word:kakadangat|kakadangat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadangat|thadangat]] || [[word:jadangat|jadangat]] || [[word:shadangat|shadangat]] || [[word:kadangat|kadangat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadangat|thadangat]] || [[word:jadangat|jadangat]] || [[word:shadangat|shadangat]] || [[word:kadangat|kadangat]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadangat|shadangat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadangat|goshadangat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadangat|gokishadangat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadangatnĂŒ|shadangatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadangatnknĂŒ|goshadangatnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadangatnĂŒ|gokishadangatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadangatshĂ«|shadangatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadangatnkshĂ«|goshadangatnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadangatshĂ«|gokishadangatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadangatro|shadangatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadangatnkro|goshadangatnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadangatro|gokishadangatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadangatmu|shadangatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadangatnkmu|goshadangatnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadangatmu|gokishadangatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadangatsher|shadangatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadangatnksher|goshadangatnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadangatsher|gokishadangatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadangatng|shadangatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadangatnkng|goshadangatnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadangatng|gokishadangatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadangatya|shadangatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadangatnkya|goshadangatnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadangatya|gokishadangatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadangatyam|shadangatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadangatnkyam|goshadangatnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadangatyam|gokishadangatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadangatnĂŒshĂ«|shadangatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadangatnknĂŒshĂ«|goshadangatnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadangatnĂŒshĂ«|gokishadangatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadangatnĂŒro|shadangatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadangatnknĂŒro|goshadangatnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadangatnĂŒro|gokishadangatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadangatnĂŒmu|shadangatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadangatnknĂŒmu|goshadangatnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadangatnĂŒmu|gokishadangatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadangatshĂ«nĂŒ|shadangatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadangatnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshadangatnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadangatshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishadangatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadangatshĂ«ro|shadangatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadangatnkshĂ«ro|goshadangatnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadangatshĂ«ro|gokishadangatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadangatshĂ«mu|shadangatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadangatnkshĂ«mu|goshadangatnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadangatshĂ«mu|gokishadangatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadangatronĂŒ|shadangatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadangatnkronĂŒ|goshadangatnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadangatronĂŒ|gokishadangatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadangatroshĂ«|shadangatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadangatnkroshĂ«|goshadangatnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadangatroshĂ«|gokishadangatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadangatromu|shadangatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadangatnkromu|goshadangatnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadangatromu|gokishadangatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadangatmunĂŒ|shadangatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadangatnkmunĂŒ|goshadangatnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadangatmunĂŒ|gokishadangatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadangatmushĂ«|shadangatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadangatnkmushĂ«|goshadangatnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadangatmushĂ«|gokishadangatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadangatmuro|shadangatmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadangatnkmuro|goshadangatnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadangatmuro|gokishadangatmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
